name: Node Ryzeal
desc: If you have an Xyz Monster in your field or GY, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If Summoned this way, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Rank 4 Xyz Monsters. You can only Special Summon "Node Ryzeal" once per turn this way. You can send 1 card from your hand or field to the GY, then target 1 "Ryzeal" monster in your GY, except "Node Ryzeal"; Special Summon it in Defense Position, but negate its effects. You can only use this effect of "Node Ryzeal" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you have an Xyz Monster in your field or GY, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If Summoned this way, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Rank 4 Xyz Monsters. You can only Special Summon "Node Ryzeal" once per turn this way. You can send 1 card from your hand or field to the GY, then target 1 "Ryzeal" monster in your GY, except "Node Ryzeal"; Special Summon it in Defense Position, but negate its effects. You can only use this effect of "Node Ryzeal" once per turn.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Rank specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
